en: My love, he makes me feel like nobody else, nobody else
ko: 내 사랑은 나를 다른 누구보다 특별하게 만들어

en: But my love, he doesn't love me So I tell myself, I tell myself
ko: 하지만 내 사랑은 나를 사랑하지 않아

en: One, don't pick up the phone You know he's only calling cause he's drunk and alone
Two, don't let him in You'll have to kick him out again
Three, don't be his friend You know you're gonna wake up in his bed in the morning
And if you're under him You ain't getting over him
ko: 그와 함께 있으면 그를 잊을 수 없어

en: I got no rules, I count em
I got no rules, I count em
I got no rules, I count em
I got no rules, I count em
I got no rules, I count em
I keep pushing forwards But he keeps pulling me backwards
